name: Cheese Please Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, gently heat 3/4 cup cheese with soup and milk, stirring constantly until the cheese melts.
2. Combine rice and chopped green pepper in a greased 2-quart casserole dish.
3. Alternate layers of rice and flaked salmon, beginning with rice.
4. Pour the cheese-milk-soup mixture over all the layers.
5. Ring the casserole with crumbs mixed with melted butter.
6. Place additional cheese inside the crumb ring.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes.
